```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.6em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;display:flex;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E5F2EE,#C8E6C9);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">CLAUDE.md</code>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Project root. Keep short.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#2C8475;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.45em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">auto</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;display:flex;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">~/.claude/CLAUDE.md</code>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Every project.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.2em 0.45em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">global</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;display:flex;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="book-open" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">.claude/rules/*.md</code>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">On-demand topical.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.45em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">on demand</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;display:flex;gap:0.55em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);opacity:0.85;">
   <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EDEDED;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#9B8EA0;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="brain" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;font-weight:700;">memory/</code>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Auto-managed. Never synced.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#EDEDED;padding:0.2em 0.45em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">ignore</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C3E50,#1F2C3A);color:#FFB84D;padding:0.65em 1em;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.6em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(44,62,80,0.18);">
  <span style="color:#F8F7F0;">Trigger to write a rule:</span>
  &nbsp;<em style="color:#FFB84D;">"reproduce this reliably."</em>
 </div>

</div>
```
